name: Tf2_mei4_repressed_loci
description: Mei4-regulated Tf2 loci in S. pombe. Mei4 is the master transcription factor for middle-meiotic genes and also a Tf2 repressor. The ~13 full-length Tf2 elements plus ~10 solo-LTR-flanked Mei4-dependent meiotic genes form an overlapping regulatory network. This record marks the Tf2 elements that are derepressed in mei4-delta cells.

architecture.internal_structure: 4900 bp dispersed unit; LTR 350 bp where applicable
